description: Transform the messy college application deadline spreadsheet by standardizing dates, calculating urgency, and sorting by priority. Apply conditional formatting to highlight critical deadlines and save the final spreadsheet to ~/Documents/college_applications_processed.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: You have a spreadsheet tracking college applications with inconsistent date formats. Standardize the dates, add a 'Days Until Deadline' column with formulas, sort by urgency (earliest first), and apply conditional formatting to highlight deadlines within 14 days.
